Name: SQLAzure - Restore a SQL Azure database from a .bacpac located in Azure Storage
Description:
Given an existing [.bacpac](https://msdn.microsoft.com/en-us/library/azure/hh335292.aspx) in Azure Storage this template restores a SQL Azure database.

**Note** - The storage account used needs to reside in the the same subscription as the SQL Azure Server.

Parameters.Name: AzureManagementCertificate
Parameters.Label: The Azure management certificate associated with the subscription
Parameters.HelpText: The Azure Management Certificate that can be sourced via https://manage.windowsazure.com/publishsettings

Parameters.Name: AzureSubscriptionId
Parameters.Label: The Azure Subscription ID
Parameters.HelpText: The Azure Subscription ID that can be sourced via the [Azure Portal](https://portal.azure.com) or https://manage.windowsazure.com/publishsettings

Parameters.Name: AzureSubscriptionName
Parameters.Label: The Azure Subscription Name
Parameters.HelpText: The Azure Subscription Name that can be sourced via the [Azure Portal](https://portal.azure.com) or https://manage.windowsazure.com/publishsettings

Parameters.Name: SqlAzureAdminUser
Parameters.Label: The SQL Azure Server Admin User
Parameters.HelpText: The SQL Azure Server Administrator User

Parameters.Name: SqlAzureAdminUserPassword
Parameters.Label: The SQL Azure Admin Password
Parameters.HelpText: The SQL Azure Server Administrator Password

Parameters.Name: SQLAzureServerName
Parameters.Label: The SQL Azure Server
Parameters.HelpText: The name of the SQL Azure Server.  Just the server name e.g.  wyn4its2by

Parameters.Name: DatabaseName
Parameters.Label: The SQL Azure Database used for the  bacpac restore
Parameters.HelpText: The name of the SQL Azure Database to which you wish to restore the .bacpac file.

Parameters.Name: SQLAzureDatabaseEdition
Parameters.Label: The SQL Azure database edition to use
Parameters.HelpText: The [SQL Azure Database Edition](https://msdn.microsoft.com/en-us/library/dn546725.aspx) to use for the restore

Parameters.Name: SQLAzureServiceObjective
Parameters.Label: The SQL Azure SQL Service Objective to use
Parameters.HelpText:
The [SQL Azure Database Objective](https://msdn.microsoft.com/en-us/library/dn546721.aspx) for the database being restored.

Basic, S0, S1, S2, P1, P2, or P3.

DisplaySettings.Octopus.SelectOptions:
Basic|Basic
S0|Standard (S0)
S1|Standard (S1)
S2|Standard (S2)
S3|Standard (S3)
P1|Premium (P1)
P2|Premium (P2)
P3|Premium (P3)

Parameters.Name: AzureStorageAccountName
Parameters.Label: The Azure Storage Account where the .bacpac file is located
Parameters.HelpText: The Azure Storage Account where the .bacpac file is located

Parameters.Name: AzureStorageContainerName
Parameters.Label: The container name of the bacpac file
Parameters.HelpText: The container in Azure storage where the .bacpac file is located.

Parameters.Name: BacPacFileName
Parameters.Label: The name of the bacpac file to restore
Parameters.HelpText: The name of the .bacpac file to restore.
